description: Configure GPredict for a static antenna alignment dashboard tracking three geostationary satellites at a Nebraska data center. Add a ground station named 'Omaha_DataCenter' (41.2565 N, 95.9345 W, 332m altitude, weather station KOMA). Create transponder frequency data files in ~/.config/Gpredict/trsp/ for GOES 16 (NORAD ID 43013, [HRIT] section, 1694.1 MHz), GOES 18 (NORAD ID 51850, [HRIT] section, 1694.1 MHz), and SES-1 (NORAD ID 36516, [Ku_Beacon] section, 11.7 GHz), specifying DOWN_LOW frequencies in Hertz. Create an alignment module named 'GEO_Alignment' tracking these three satellites using the Omaha_DataCenter ground station. Configure the dashboard for List View only and set global preferences to display UTC time. The GPredict window should remain open, maximized, and focused on the GEO_Alignment module.
